free_text: Samples of CeO2 powder of natural isotopic abundance
with mass ranging from 10 to 150 mg
The gamma rays were observed with a high-
purity Ge detector with nominal volume of 169 cm3,
efficiency of 35% compared with NaI at 1332 keV,
resolution of 1.68 keV at 1332 keV. Source to
detector distances for the cross-section measurements
Samples were irradiated at four different irradiation
stations of the Oregon State University TRIGA  reactor
Data taken from tab.2 of the reference
form of alloy of 0.134% in thin Al metal foil
